note: Official image (QNS_5182 / repo 14_5_0.jpeg): blue car behind white car, railway crossing is BEHIND them (already passed), road ahead clear with no solid line, no overtaking-ban sign, no oncoming traffic. The 100m-before-crossing ban does not apply, so overtaking is Дозволено = option 3. Our stored answer 1 ('Заборонено if white >30 km/h') has no PDR basis. Note: testpdr.online erroneously marks option 2 ('Заборонено в будь-якому випадку'), describing the crossing as ahead — contradicted by the authoritative official image. alt_read=3 confirmed.
